title: LookupTableExportV2 dtype mismatch aborts process

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Export an int64 StaticHashTable through LookupTableExportV2 while requesting string keys and values.
expected: TensorFlow should raise a framework-level InvalidArgumentError for dtype mismatch.
observed: The process aborts after a CHECK failure: dtype() == expected_dtype (7 vs. 9).
